doc
Cenarium moved page [[Template:Task]] to [[Template:Phab]]
making work for both Txxxx and xxxx
+empty case
so far for the sandbox idea, I can still get it wrong
[[WP:AES|←]]Blanked the page
Reverted edits by [[Special:Contribs/5.110.86.7|5.110.86.7]] ([[User talk:5.110.86.7|talk]]) to last version by Be..anyone
Restructure
fix

Protected "[[Template:Phab]]": [[WP:High-risk templates|Highly visible template]] ([Edit=Allow only template editors and admins] (indefinite) [Move=Allow only template editors and admins] (indefinite))
Add option to match the output of [[Template:Bugzilla]]
sync with sandbox per ER
HouseBlaster moved page [[Template:Phab]] to [[Template:Phabricator]] without leaving a redirect: expand template name for clarity per [[WP:TPN]]
Fix typo that was causing "T" to appear before the label value if specified
Apologies, that was incorrect. Reverting while I work out the correct fix
tfm
Unlinking circular redirects: [[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2025 March 17#Template:Task]] closed as redirect ([[WP:XFDC#4.0.16|XFDcloser]])
22 revisions imported from [[:wikipedia:Template:Phabricator]]
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23525408989|commit triggered pipeline]]
Text replacement - "</noinclude>↵<noinclude>" to ""
Fix multiple issues surrounding labels and prefixes
1 revision imported: overwriting to try to fix the lower alpha issue
Fix multiple issues surrounding labels and prefixes
1 revision imported: overwriting to try to fix the lower alpha issue
Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24957526818|time triggered pipeline]]
